channel.title: Data Analysis on Brimborium
channel.description: Recent content in Data Analysis on Brimborium

item.title: Exploring Survival on Titanic
item.description: Log Date Change 07.10.2016 Initial version 08.01.2017 Rewritten section 5 Outline This Jupyter notebook uses the Titanic dataset from Kaggle for the prediction of survival rates among passengers on the Titanic. RMS Titanic was a British passenger liner that sank in the North Atlantic Ocean in the early morning of 15 April 1912, after colliding with an iceberg during her maiden voyage from Southampton to New York City.
